Headline: #3 King Drive, # 66 Chicago and # 26 South Shore Express Temporary Reroute near Michigan/Chicago
ShortDescription: #3 King Drive, # 66 Chicago and # 26 South Shore Express buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage at Michigan/Chicago.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#3 King Drive, # 66 Chicago and # 26 South Shore Express buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage at Michigan/Chicago.

Southbound #3 King Drive buses will operate via Ontario, Michigan, and over regular route.

Northbound #3 King Drive buses will operate via Michigan, Pearson, Mies Van De roe, Chicago, and over regular route.

Eastbound #66 Chicago buses will operate via Chicago, Michigan, Ohio, Fairbanks, and over regular route

Westbound #66 Chicago buses will operate via Grand, Fairbanks, Ontario, Michigan, and over regular route.

Northbound #26 South Shore Express buses will operate via Michigan, Oak, Inner Lake Shore Drive, Chicago, and over regular route

Southbound #66 Chicago buses will operate via Chicago, Fairbanks, Ontario, Michigan, and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #47 47th Temporary Reroute at 47th/Kedzie
ShortDescription: 47 47th buses are temporarily rerouted via 47th, California, 51st, Kedzie, Orange Line, 51st, Lawndale, Archer and 47th: near 47th/Kedzie.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#47 47th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 47th, California, 51st, Kedzie, Orange Line, 51st, Lawndale, Archer, 47th and over regular route due to street blockage near 47th/Kedzie.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #87 87th Temporary Westbound Reroute near 87th/Lafayette
ShortDescription: Westbound 87 87th buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, Lafayette, 95th, Halsted and 87th: due to, street blockage near 87th/Lafayette.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound 87 87th buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, Lafayette, 95th, Halsted, 87th and over regular route: due to, street blockage near 87th/Lafayette.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
